search_query: how civil liberties differ from civil rights
combined_text: What are Civil Liberties? - Definition, Examples & Cases Instructor: Mark Pearcy What are civil liberties? How are they different from civil rights? How do we know exactly what (and when) they are? The issue of civil liberties began with the Constitution and continues with the U. S. Supreme Court. Defining Civil Liberties You have the right to free speech
